    A

    addPiece(int, int, int) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Adds a piece to the specified square on the chessboard.

    C

    calculateBestMove(int) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Instructs the Stockfish engine to calculate the best move within a specified time limit.

    ChessImage - Class in com.chess.images
     
    ChessImage(int, int, Color) - Constructor for class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Creates a new blank image with an optional colored background.
    ChessImage(ChessPiece) - Constructor for class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Loads a chess piece image from the resources stored in the JAR file.
    ChessImage(String) - Constructor for class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Creates a new ChessImage based on the file path to an existing image.

    ChessWindow - Class in com.chess.window
     
    ChessWindow() - Constructor for class com.chess.window.ChessWindow
     
    clearHash() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Clears the hash table in the Stockfish engine, effectively starting a new game.
    clearMoveHistory() - Method in class com.chess.main.MoveStorage
    Clears the move history, typically used to reset the game or start a new one.

    currentPlayer() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Determines which player is currently allowed to move.

    D

    displayChessPieces(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.window.ChessWindow
    Displays all chess pieces on the board, excluding the piece currently being dragged (if any).

    G

    GameAnalyzer - Class in com.montecarlo.analysis
     
    GameAnalyzer() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.analysis.GameAnalyzer

    GameData() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.data.GameData

    GameStorage() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.data.GameStorage
     
    getAllLegalMoves(ChessBoard.Player) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Returns all legal moves for the current player.
    getAlpha(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Gets the alpha (transparency) component of the pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    getAnalysisOutput() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Retrieves the full analysis output from the Stockfish engine up to the point where it finds the best move.
    getBestMove() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Retrieves the best move suggested by the Stockfish engine based on the current game state.
    getBlue(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Gets the blue component of the pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    getBoard() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Returns a copy of the current chessboard as a 2D array.
    getBoard() - Method in class com.chess.window.ChessWindow
    Get the board that is currently displayed in the window.
    getBoardArray() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Returns the chessboard as a one-dimensional array with the rating of the position as the last element.
    getFileName() - Method in enum class com.chess.images.ChessPiece
    Retrieves the file name associated with the chess piece.
    getGreen(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Gets the green component of the pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    getLegalMoves() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Retrieves a list of legal moves from the current position in the Stockfish engine.
    getMoveHistory() - Method in class com.chess.main.MoveStorage
    Retrieves the move history.
    getMoveRating() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Retrieves the most recent evaluation rating of the move from the Stockfish engine.
    getRed(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Gets the red component of the pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    getResponse() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Reads and returns the response from the Stockfish engine until a termination keyword is found.
    getRGB(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Gets the RGB value of the pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.

    I

    isEngineReady() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Checks if the Stockfish engine is ready to receive new commands.
    isInCheck(ChessBoard.Player) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Checks if the king of the specified player is in check.
    isValidMove(String) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Checks if a given move is valid based on the current game state in the Stockfish engine.

    movePiece(int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Moves a piece from one square to another on the chessboard.
    movePiece(String) - Method in class com.chess.window.ChessWindow
    Executes a move on the chessboard based on a move string and updates the visual display.

    Constructor to initialize the move storage list.

    N

    nextMove() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Switches the turn to the next player (White to Black or Black to White).

    PerformanceAnalyzer - Class in com.montecarlo.analysis
     
    PerformanceAnalyzer() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.analysis.PerformanceAnalyzer
     
    printBoardWithIndices() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Prints the current state of the chessboard with indices for reference.

    R

    RandomPlayer - Class in com.montecarlo.simulation
     
    RandomPlayer() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.simulation.RandomPlayer
     
    removePiece(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Removes a piece from the specified square on the chessboard.

    S

    save(String) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Saves the current BufferedImage to the specified file path.
    sendCommand(String) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Sends a specified command to the Stockfish engine for processing.
    setAnalysisDepth(int) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Sets the analysis depth for the Stockfish engine, instructing it to search up to a specific depth.
    setDebugMode(boolean) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Enables or disables debug mode for the Stockfish engine by setting the debug log file.
    setOption(String, String) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Sets a specific option for the Stockfish engine with a given value.
    setRGB(int, int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Sets the RGB values of a pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    setRGB(int, int, int, int, int, int) - Method in class com.chess.images.ChessImage
    Sets the RGBA (red, green, blue, alpha) values of a pixel at the specified (x, y) coordinates.
    setThreads(int) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Sets the number of threads to be used by the Stockfish engine for processing.
    SimulationRunner - Class in com.montecarlo.simulation
     
    SimulationRunner() - Constructor for class com.montecarlo.simulation.SimulationRunner
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class com.chess.window.ChessWindow
    Initializes the primary stage (main window) for the chess game.
    startEngine() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Starts the Stockfish engine process and initializes input and output streams for communication.
    startGame() - Method in class com.chess.main.ChessGame
    Starts the game, initializing the Stockfish engine and controlling the main game loop.
    StockfishConnector - Class in com.chess.stockfish
     
    StockfishConnector() - Constructor for class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
     
    stopEngine() - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Stops the Stockfish engine and releases all associated resources.
    storeMove(ChessBoard, double) - Method in class com.chess.main.MoveStorage
    Stores a move by copying the board state and appending the score.

    T

    toChessNotation(int, int) - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Converts board coordinates into standard chess notation (e.g., "e4").
    toString() - Method in class com.chess.board.ChessBoard
    Returns a string representation of the chessboard.
    toString() - Method in class com.chess.main.MoveStorage
    Returns a string representation of the move history, displaying the board and rating for each stored move in a format like: [-2 -3 -4 ... 2 0.56]

    U

    updateGameState(String) - Method in class com.chess.stockfish.StockfishConnector
    Updates the game state in the Stockfish engine to reflect the current position based on the provided move history.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.chess.board.ChessBoard.Player
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.chess.images.ChessPiece
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.chess.board.ChessBoard.Player
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.chess.images.ChessPiece
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
